note: Changed `continue` to `return executionAttemptSummary{}, "", false, nil` in latestCompletedGateExecution (gate.go:288). When the newest matching attempt is git-guard-blocked, the loop now terminates rather than falling back to older successful attempts.

Added CommitObjects map[string]bool to gitGuardSnapshot and a collectCommitObjects helper using `git cat-file --batch-check=%(objecttype) %(objectname) --batch-all-objects`. New commit objects are checked in the `len(detectedMuts)==0` path (git_guard.go), catching dangling commits created via low-level commands when no ref or HEAD mutation is otherwise detected.
Same fix as f_001: the gate.go early-return on a blocked attempt prevents any older successful attempt from being used. f_001 and f_003 described the same gate fallback bug.

Same fix as f_002: CommitObjects snapshot and post-transport comparison added to gitGuardTakeSnapshot and gitGuardCompareAndRestore respectively. f_002 and f_004 described the same missing commit-object snapshot.

Extended ReflogHints snapshot to cover all refs (not just HEAD and stash) by iterating snap.Refs in gitGuardTakeSnapshot. Added a non-HEAD reflog comparison loop in gitGuardCompareAndRestore: for any ref whose SHA is unchanged, if its reflog tip hash differs from the snapshot, the advance-and-retract pattern is detected and classified as executor_git_guard_inconclusive.

Added filepath.WalkDir over .git/refs/ in gitGuardPrechecks to detect any loose ref lock files (e.g. refs/heads/main.lock) using fs.SkipAll for early termination. Test added: TestGitGuardPrechecks_LooseRefLock.

Added three lifecycle integration tests in gate_test.go: TestGitGuardLifecycle_PreconditionBlocksTransport (dirty git repo → transport not called, result has terminal_reason), TestGitGuardLifecycle_GateBlockedByGuardedAttempt (gate refuses when latest attempt has git_guard terminal_reason), and TestGitGuardLifecycle_ReadOnlyStageSkipsGuard (review stage in dirty git repo calls transport normally).

Added three missing test cases in git_guard_test.go: TestGitGuardPrechecks_LooseRefLock (loose ref lock file detection), TestGitGuardAgentError (transport error after mutation — guard still detects and restores, error recorded in Detail), TestGitGuardReviewFixBaseline (pre-existing dirty execute-phase changes not flagged as mutations), TestGitGuardInconclusiveSuppressesRestore (stash+ref mutation — inconclusive dominates and all restoration is suppressed).
Same fix as f_001/f_003: the gate.go `continue` was changed to an early return, eliminating the fallback path entirely. f_001, f_003, and f_009 all described the same gate backward-search bug.
